# Support

For normal open-source questions, use this repository's issues.

For a focused paid review of a Go/Gin/GORM/MySQL API service:

- Review page: https://x2.brucelu.top/goapi/?source=github-support-exhibition-svc-golang
- Sample review: https://x2.brucelu.top/goapi/sample/?source=github-support-exhibition-svc-golang
- Ask first: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=goapi&source=github-support-exhibition-svc-golang
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/goapi/checkout/?source=github-support-exhibition-svc-golang

Do not post secrets, database credentials, JWT keys, private customer data, or proprietary production logs in public issues.
